SOLTEC ENGINEERING

Revolutionizing
Engineering in Africa

Our mission is to revolutionize engineering in Africa through timely innovation, and ultra-modern technology by delivering optimal engineering solutions within and across the continent.

GET QUOTE

About Us

We’re an engineering firm looking to solve critical problems, especially the ones facing developing and under-developed African countries through innovative technology and engineering.

We are constantly improving and are committed to out-thinking and out-executing our competitors. We take on what others dismiss as impossible and solve the hard problems that others walk away from.

Registered Company
NSE and COREN certified
24/7 customer support

Our firm is duly registered under the Corporate Affairs Commission with RC No. 1865563

CONTACT US NOW

+234 803 981 4257

Core Values

Safety

Prioritizing the security and well-being of clients, staff, and our environmental infrastructure ecosystems.

Quality

Providing uncompromised excellence in engineering services, products, and operational workflows.

Integrity

Upholding complete transparency, honesty, and strictly ethical operations across all channels.

Our Services

We span multiple high-tech ecosystems to bring maximum integrated value. Here is where we excel to secure the future.

POWER AND ENERGY

Solar installation and all kinds of activities, works and services relating to environmentally sustainable energy.

BUILDING & CONSTRUCTION

Includes lab or field testing, analysis and monitoring of structures, and building materials such as foundations.

SMART SECURITY

We provide and install a comprehensive security network that gives you complete protection and control - anywhere.

SOFTWARE DEVELOPMENT

Plan, design, develop, integrate, test, manage and evolve software solutions offering end-to-end support.

TEACHING COURSES

Front, Back and Fullstack Web Development, Mobile App Development, Product Design, Blockchain.

ROBOTICS AND AUTOMATION

Innovative robotics and automation services creating smart ecosystems to eliminate routine human intervention.

What Our Clients Are Saying

ENGR. OPURUM EMMANUEL

MD/CEO

About Our CEO

Engr. Opurum Emmanuel is a Computer and Electronics Engineer, Server administrator, software developer, digital marketer and ethical hacker. He is also a certified Cisco Network Administrator, robotics engineer, blockchain developer and cyber security expert.

As a creative thinker and innovator, he has been creating solutions to the challenges of Nigeria and other developing regions across Africa through various innovative technologies.

FAQ

In Engineering, questions are often specific, and some answers just spin more questions. If that’s the case, please Contact Us, and let’s talk about your specifics. We’re happy to take a minute.

ASK A QUESTION

I want solar but i can't tamper my roof to mount the panels?

We have developed an advanced automated sun tracking device that can enable you mount your panels anywhere without having to tamper your rooftop.

How long is your product warranty??

What Payment Options do you Support?
